name: FSIL_EnableNameManagement
title: FSIL_EnableNameManagement
description: Activates the name management of a node. Not until the name management is activated another node can change the device name of this node by sending a name management message.

parameters.name: fs
parameters.description: FS simulation node to apply the function

return: 0 on success or FS IL Error Code

example.code:
//allow every component to be changed except arbitrary address capable flag
FSIL_EnableNameManagement(1, 0xFE);
